description: Verify file integrity of Adobe Illustrator file: metadata completeness, creator tool, font embedding, and content presence.
prompt_instructions: Scan the document text extracted from an Adobe Illustrator (.ai) file.
Check for metadata fields: title, author, creation date, and modification date.
Verify that the creator tool is Adobe Illustrator (look for 'Adobe Illustrator' or 'Illustrator' in creator/producer metadata).
Check if fonts are embedded in the document (look for font embedding references or embedded font data).
Verify that the document contains actual content (not an empty or placeholder file).

Format the output as JSON: { "title": "<title or null>", "author": "<author or null>", "creation_date": "<date or null>", "modification_date": "<date or null>", "creator_tool": "<tool name or null>", "is_illustrator_file": <true/false>, "fonts_embedded": <true/false>, "has_content": <true/false>, "metadata_complete": <true/false>, "status": "<Valid/Invalid/Incomplete>" }.
Set metadata_complete to true only if title, author, and at least one date are present.
Set status to 'Valid' if is_illustrator_file is true, has_content is true, and metadata_complete is true.
Set status to 'Incomplete' if some checks pass but not all. Set status to 'Invalid' if critical checks fail.
Respond ONLY with the JSON output.
